n: Into Sant Lhoer, the Poison Gardens

steps.t: Rhúnelleth has suggested that you speak with Dolág, whose brother went missing while scouting the Poison Gardens of Carn Dûm. Dolág is at Bail Avarc, …
Determined to rescue her missing brother, Dolág has asked you to meet her at the entrance of Sant Lhoer, the Poison Gardens. The Poison Gardens are lo…
Dolág has met you inside the gate of the Poison Gardens and is waiting for you to press on. You should look for her missing brother.
While exploring Sant Lhoer, you have come across a glass gazebo. You should search inside for signs of Málruv.
Within an iron and glass gazebo in Sant Lhoer, you were set upon by Tarkka-oka and his Keeper, Cráthair. Upon their defeat, you found an iron key. Dol…
You have discovered an iron key on the body of Cráthair. Dolág thinks it may unlock a gate she saw on the northern end of the Poison Gardens. You shou…
You leave the Poison Gardens behind and make your way towards enormous structures of iron and glass. You should continue searching for Málruv.
You have discovered massive glass and iron greenhouses within Sant Lhoer. Wait for Dolág to catch up to you and then speak with her.
You have found Málruv, and rescued him from the machinations of the Angmarim sorceress, Oganuin. You should speak with Málruv.
After defeating the sorceress Oganuin, you rescued Málruv and saw to his well-being. His worried sister is now waiting to speak with you. You should t…
Dolág waits to speak with you at Bail Avarc, near Carn Dûm.
